steps.title: Check the square
steps.content: For any real value of $x$, the expression $(x+49)^2$ cannot be negative.

steps.title: Compare with the right side
steps.content:
The equation asks for a square to equal $-81$:
$$(x+49)^2=-81$$No real value of $x$ can make that true, so there are $0$ real solutions. The answer is D.
